# BinShield

> Supply chain binary security -- decompile native package binaries, classify risky behaviors with AI, and enforce policy before machine code reaches production.

BinShield is a security platform that analyzes the compiled binary blobs inside npm and PyPI packages -- the .node files, Python C extensions, WASM modules, and pre-built binaries that every other security tool ignores. While tools like Snyk, Socket, and Phylum analyze source code and metadata, BinShield decompiles and AI-classifies the actual machine code your dependencies execute.

## Core Capabilities

- Ghidra headless decompilation of native binaries (.node, .so, .dylib, .dll, .wasm)
- AI-powered behavior classification across 6 categories: network, filesystem, process, crypto, obfuscation, data exfiltration
- Risk scoring (0-100) with severity levels: none, low, medium, high, critical
- Version-over-version binary behavior diffing
- CycloneDX 1.5 SBOM export with binary-level detail
- GitHub Action for CI/CD gate enforcement
- Watchlist alerts via email, Slack, or webhook
- Free public database of pre-analyzed top packages

## Quick Start

1. Search the public database:
   curl https://api.binshield.dev/packages/search?q=bcrypt

2. Get a specific package analysis:
   curl https://api.binshield.dev/packages/npm/bcrypt/versions/5.1.1

3. Add the GitHub Action to your repo:
   uses: ashlrai/binshield-action@v1
   with:
     fail-on: high

4. Export a CycloneDX SBOM:
   curl https://api.binshield.dev/packages/npm/bcrypt/versions/5.1.1/sbom

## API Base URL

https://api.binshield.dev

## Authentication

Authenticated endpoints require an API key in the Authorization header:
Authorization: Bearer bsh_live_YOUR_KEY

Public endpoints (health, package search, package details, SBOM) do not require authentication.

## API Endpoints

### Public (no auth required)
- GET /health -- Service health and configuration
- GET /packages/search?q={query} -- Search the package database
- GET /packages/:ecosystem/:name -- List all analyzed versions of a package
- GET /packages/:ecosystem/:name/versions/:version -- Full analysis for a specific version
- GET /packages/:ecosystem/:name/versions/:version/sbom -- CycloneDX SBOM export
- GET /packages/:ecosystem/:name/diff?from={v1}&to={v2} -- Binary behavior diff between versions

### Scans (auth required)
- POST /scans/packages -- Submit a package for analysis
- GET /scans/:id -- Check scan job status

### Organization Management (auth required)
- GET /orgs/:orgId -- Get organization details
- GET /orgs/:orgId/repos -- List monitored repositories
- POST /orgs/:orgId/repos -- Add a repository
- GET /orgs/:orgId/watchlists -- List watchlists
- POST /orgs/:orgId/watchlists -- Create a watchlist
- POST /orgs/:orgId/watchlists/:watchlistId/packages -- Add package to watchlist
- GET /orgs/:orgId/subscription -- Get subscription details
- POST /orgs/:orgId/subscription -- Update subscription
- GET /orgs/:orgId/api-keys -- List API keys
- POST /orgs/:orgId/api-keys -- Create an API key

### Billing (auth required)
- POST /billing/checkout -- Create a Stripe checkout session
- POST /billing/webhook -- Stripe webhook handler

## GitHub Action

```yaml
- uses: ashlrai/binshield-action@v1
  with:
    fail-on: high          # critical | high | medium | low | never
    scan-mode: native-only # native-only | all-dependencies
    comment-mode: summary  # summary | pr-comment | both | off
    api-key: ${{ secrets.BINSHIELD_API_KEY }}
    github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
```

## Pricing

- Free: $0/mo -- 3 repos, 50 scans/month, public database access
- Pro: $149/mo -- 25 repos, 2,500 scans/month, watchlists, API access
- Team: $499/mo -- 50 repos, 10,000 scans/month, shared visibility
- Enterprise: Custom -- 1,000 repos, 100,000 scans/month, compliance controls

## Risk Scoring

Scores combine finding severity weights, behavior weights, import complexity, and function count:
- Finding weights: info=2, low=8, medium=18, high=30, critical=45
- Behavior weights: network=14, filesystem=4, process=12, crypto=3, obfuscation=24, dataExfiltration=28
- Package score = max_binary * 0.65 + avg_binary * 0.35
- Levels: none (0), low (1-29), medium (30-59), high (60-79), critical (80-100)

## Supported Ecosystems

- npm (Node.js native addons)
- PyPI (Python C extensions) -- coming soon

- Website: https://binshield.dev
- API: https://api.binshield.dev
- GitHub Action: https://github.com/ashlrai/binshield

- OpenAPI spec: https://binshield.dev/openapi.json
- Support: https://github.com/ashlrai/binshield/issues
